change_comments.message:
Still the coverage is showing as 0%. https://sonarcloud.io/code?id=policy-opa-pdp

Just FYI : When we put this property 
sonar.go.coverage.reportPaths=coverage.out
in sonar-project.properties, it was showing the coverage. It needs coverage.out to be present

You can verify here : https://sonarcloud.io/code?id=sri-yan_policy-opa-pdp
